channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple potholes on Barnfield Wood Road from the roundabout up to and beyond Fairway Gardens. Some feel a couple of inches deep and are particular hazard to cyclists (especially when using middle of road to avoid all the parked cars).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish left here, 23rd March
item.description:
Large amount of rubbish left here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised street tree on Norhwold Road opp Alconbury Road x 3, 23rd March
item.description:
Vandalised street trees (sapling) x 3. Along Northwold Road starting opp Alconbury Road moving east. All 3 broken trunk at height of metal cage. Must have occured weekend 21 / 22 march 2026
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of mattesses on Southey Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Two mattresses dumped on Southey Road next to Hermes Court, appears to be fly-tipping. Lots of dumped rubbish nearby too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southey Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drains, 23rd March
item.description:
Drains remain blocked despite previous reports having been closed as fixed
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horn Link Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lampost on the square between regency way and crooklog is not working comes on then goes off .so there is no light for the rest of the night , this makes it dangerous if you need to walk home that way, 23rd March
item.description:
The lampost is not working between the open area between regency way and crook log
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regency Way, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40cm pothole opened up. Large chunks of rock being thrown into roadway., 23rd March
item.description:
The road surface has recently broken open and pieces of the foundation are exposed and breaking up. Swept aside by me as cyclist use the road. Not sure when it first opened up but it is rapidly getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitmore Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped clothes - once again outside the same property!, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish is being left outside the same property on king's highway - an HMO - this has been a consistent problem for several months! Please address this! Not only is their front garden full of rubbish but it gets chucked out onto the pavement too!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kings Highway, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent overnight parking in park entrance, 23rd March
item.description:
This car is causing all sorts of problems by parking in the entrance of the park. Cats can't turn, neighbours can't come out of their drive etc.... Worse than that, the owner of this vehicle who lives on the first floor off No 22, is parking 3 different vehicles on this road! Please can the council activate enforcement?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norfolk Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morden Wharf Road, Greenwich
